_fintegrity_notes.removal_rationale: These are US/UK institutional-data providers. None apply to Fintegrity's CFOaaS work for Nordic SMEs. Re-add only if a specific client engagement requires the underlying subscription.
planned_additions: fintegrity-fabric — Custom MCP server against the Fabric semantic model (medallion gold layer per client). Uses Entra OBO for client isolation. Add when the server is deployed.
fortnox — Direct Fortnox API access for live bookkeeping queries. Pending an MCP wrapper around the Fortnox REST API.
kleer — Activity and cost-category lookups against Kleer. Pending API access and an MCP wrapper.
_fintegrity_notes.format_note: JSON does not support comments — these notes live under a leading-underscore key that consumers should ignore. Move planned additions into mcpServers as they ship.
